scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.heroku-postbuild: PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/bot-dashboard/ VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=$GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID pnpm --filter @workspace/bot-dashboard run build && node scripts/copy-frontend.mjs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
